subcodes.first_line: O emigrant servant! Hearken unto the call of this Youth at the time when thou didst appear before Him from among the wonders [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد المهاجر اسمع ندآء  هذالغلام  حین الذی حضر بین یدیه من بدایع
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @thankfulness; gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
